THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT GREENE, RICHARD FISHER, RICHARD ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $30,916.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $30,916.50, IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED THAT THE COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANTS ARE AWARDED COSTS OF SUIT, INCLUDING ATTORNEY FEES(PER DEFENDANTS' COST BILL & MOTION FOR ATTYS FEES)
